file(GLOB NET_SRCS "src/*.cpp")

# Cross-straddle REQUIRES come from staging/components/<repo>/spangap_requires.cmake,
# auto-generated by spangap-inside from this straddle's requires:/optional_requires:
# intersected with the staged set. spangap-lcd flows in iff it's staged; that
# same condition defines CONFIG_SPANGAP_LCD, so the lcdSetting* call sites in
# net.cpp / spangap_mdns.cpp gate consistently.
include(${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/spangap_requires.cmake)
idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${NET_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS "include"
    REQUIRES
        ${SPANGAP_REQUIRES}
        esp_event
        esp_wifi
        esp_netif
        nvs_flash
        lwip
        mbedtls
        espressif__mdns
        esp_timer
        json
)
